data.biography:
Liu Sue-Hua (Chinese: 	劉雪華, born 12 November 1959) also known as Leanne Liu, is a Golden Bell Award-winning Hong Kong actress born in Beijing.

She first starred in Shaw Brothers films in Hong Kong, but moved to Taiwan in the 1980s to focus on her television career. She is particularly famous for appearing in a large number of television adaptations of Chiung Yao's novels. She is still active in Mainland Chinese series and is one of the highest paid television actresses there.
data.name: Leanne Liu

data.biography:
刘雪华（英文名：Leanne Liu，1959年11月12日－），著名女演员，出生于北京。

幼时随父母移居香港。1978年高中毕业后，刘考进了长城影业公司，不久转入邵氏影业公司，先后拍过《冤家》、《情不自禁》、《情劫》等电影。

1980年代中期，在许多台湾演员流港拍电影时，她反流向台湾，并连续五年演出琼瑶的作品，如《几度夕阳红》、《烟雨濛濛》、《在水一方》、《庭院深深》等。古装戏方面，以1984年的36集长篇连续剧《少女慈禧》（香港亚洲电视剧集）为代表。1987年在台湾举办的民意测验中，她雄居“最受欢迎的艺人”榜首，1988年更获得巴黎“第一届华语影视片雄狮奖”三位女主角之首。除了一双灵活大眼十分上镜，刘雪华更因为可于三秒内快速掉泪，擅演哭戏，而被传媒冠以“水龙头”称号来妙喻她的精彩演技，许多观众也盛赞她的哭戏演的唯美、画面好看，甚至她的名字连带变为形容人擅哭的代名词，进而街知巷闻。感情方面，刘雪华曾一度与刘德凯相恋，1995年，刘雪华流产并与刘德凯分手。1999年9月19日，与著名编剧邓育昆结婚，婚姻持续至2011年7月4日邓育昆于上海坠楼身亡。
data.name: 刘雪华

data.biography:
劉雪華，香港女演員，出生於北京。

劉雪華除了一雙靈活大眼十分上鏡，更因為可於三秒內快速掉淚，擅演哭戲，而被傳媒冠以「水龍頭」稱號來妙喻她的精彩演技，許多觀眾也盛讚她的哭戲演的唯美、畫面好看，甚至她的名字聯帶變為形容人擅哭的代名詞，進而街知巷聞。

1978 年考進了長城影業公司，不久轉入邵氏影業公司，先後拍過《冤家》、《情不自禁》、《情劫》等電影。古裝戲方面，以 1983 年的 30 集長篇聯續劇《少女慈禧》（香港亞洲電視劇集）為代表。

1980 年代中期，在許多台灣演員流港拍電影時，她反流向台灣，並聯續演出瓊瑤的作品，如《幾度夕陽紅》、《煙雨濛濛》、《庭院深深》、《在水一方》、《海鷗飛處彩雲飛》等。1987 年在台灣舉辦的民意測驗中，為「最受歡迎的藝人」榜首，1988 年更獲得巴黎「第一屆華語影視片雄獅獎」三位女主角之首。
data.name: 劉雪華

data.biography:
Sullivan grew up in Longview, Texas, an east Texas town of 70,000 people. He was an imaginative and social child early on in life, his curiosity eventually led him to the stage where he performed in one-act plays at Spring Hill High and proved to be a natural in front of live audiences. Upon high school graduation in 1996. He was offered a theater scholarship at Kilgore Junior College but instead, he accepted an academic scholarship to Baylor University and majored in business, graduating in 2000. During college, he performed in plays, was a member of Delta Tau Delta fraternity, and played one year of football. His talent for acting landed him roles in stage productions by the Baylor theater department. Though never a formal student of acting, much of Sullivan's postgraduate years have been dedicated to small budget films working closely with friends on both sides of the camera.

David starred as "Abe" in the 2004 independent film Primer, which won the Grand Jury Prize at the 2004 Sundance Film Festival. The movie was filmed in Dallas in 2001, but spent two years in editing and post-production. Since the debut of Primer, Sullivan has moved to Los Angeles to pursue a career as an actor. He has appeared in several television shows including Joey and Big Love, and filmed several movies.

Primer was Sullivan's first official casting call, and his first leading role in a feature film.
data.name: David Sullivan

data.biography:
In 2004, Hu made his breakthrough role as Li Xiaoyao in the television series Chinese Paladin, an adaptation of the action RPG The Legend of Sword and Fairy. Hu also performed two songs for the series' soundtrack and that marked the beginning of his music career.

After Chinese Paladin, Hu embarked on a number of television series projects, most of which had a wuxia theme. Hu has acted in a number of films as well, including The Ghost Inside and The 601st Phone Call. In late 2008, he co-starred with Wu Chun and Charlene Choi in The Butterfly Lovers, a film based on the Chinese legend of the Butterfly Lovers. In the same year, he played the role of Guo Jing in The Legend of the Condor Heroes, an adaptation of Louis Cha's novel of the same title.

Hu performed many songs for the soundtracks of the television dramas he starred in. On 31 October 2006. Hu released his own EP, titled Treasure or Tell Her I Love Her, which featured three songs. On 15 May 2008, Hu released his first full-length music album, titled Start, which featured ten tracks.

Hu was involved in a car accident on 29 August 2006 while travelling from Hengdian to Shanghai on the highway. He survived with severe injuries while his assistant died. Hu had to undergo surgery and the entire healing process took approximately one year. The shooting of The Legend of the Condor Heroes, which he was working on then, was temporarily halted due to his injury, in addition to being unable to complete promoting his finished project, The Young Warriors, with his fellow cast members. Hu expresses how he felt about the incident through the performance of his single, To Love, and filmed a music video with his co-star from the two series and friend Cecilia Liu.
data.name: Hu Ge

data.biography:
胡歌，1982年9月20日出生于上海市徐汇区，中国内地影视男演员、流行乐歌手，民盟盟员，二级演员（副高级）。毕业于上海戏剧学院表演系。

2004年主演个人首部电视剧《蒲公英》。2005年在仙侠剧《仙剑奇侠传》中饰演李逍遥，并演唱该剧插曲《六月的雨》、《逍遥叹》。2006年主演电视剧《天外飞仙》；同年遭遇严重车祸。2008年发行个人首张音乐专辑《出发》。2009年主演仙侠剧《仙剑奇侠传三》，并演唱片尾曲《忘记时间》。2010年主演穿越剧《神话》；同年发行音乐专辑《蓝光》。2011年参演历史题材电影《辛亥革命》，提名大众电影百花奖最佳新人奖。2012年主演玄幻剧《轩辕剑之天之痕》。2013年凭借话剧《如梦之梦》获得第2届北京丹尼国际舞台表演艺术奖最佳男演员奖。

2015年在谍战剧《伪装者》中饰演明台；同年凭借古装剧《琅琊榜》中梅长苏一角获得第22届上海电视节白玉兰奖最佳男主角奖、第28届中国电视金鹰奖观众喜爱的男演员奖、第11届中国金鹰电视艺术节最具人气男演员奖等奖项。2016年登上央视春晚演唱歌曲《相亲相爱》。2017年获得共青团中央“全国向上向善好青年”崇义友善好青年称号；同年在都市剧《猎场》中饰演郑秋冬。凭借该剧二度提名上海电视节白玉兰奖最佳男主角奖。2019年主演的电影《南方车站的聚会》入围戛纳国际电影节主竞赛单元。2022年主演电视剧《县委大院》。2023年凭借电影《不虚此行》获得第25届上海国际电影节金爵奖最佳男演员奖；同年主演都市剧《繁花》播出。
data.name: 胡歌

data.biography:
胡歌，1982 年 9 月 20 日出生於上海市徐彙區，中國內地影視男演員、流行樂歌手，民盟盟員，二級演員（副高級）。畢業於上海戲劇學院表演系。

2004 年主演個人首部電視劇《蒲公英》。2005 年在仙俠劇《仙劍奇俠傳》中飾演李逍遙，並演唱該劇插曲《六月的雨》、《逍遙嘆》。2006 年主演電視劇《天外飛仙》；同年遭遇嚴重車禍。2008 年發行個人首張音樂專輯《出發》。2009 年主演仙俠劇《仙劍奇俠傳三》，並演唱片尾曲《忘記時間》。2010 年主演穿越劇《神話》；同年發行音樂專輯《藍光》。2011 年參演歷史題材電影《辛亥革命》，提名大眾電影百花獎最佳新人獎。2012 年主演玄幻劇《軒轅劍之天之痕》。2013 年憑藉話劇《如夢之夢》獲得第 2 屆北京丹尼國際舞台表演藝術獎最佳男演員獎。

2015 年在諜戰劇《偽裝者》中飾演明台；同年憑藉古裝劇《琅琊榜》中梅長蘇一角獲得第 22 屆上海電視節白玉蘭獎最佳男主角獎、第 28 屆中國電視金鷹獎觀眾喜愛的男演員獎、第 11 屆中國金鷹電視藝術節最具人氣男演員獎等獎項。2016 年登上央視春晚演唱歌曲《相親相愛》。2017 年獲得共青團中央“全國向上向善好青年”崇義友善好青年稱號；同年在都市劇《獵場》中飾演鄭秋冬。憑藉該劇二度提名上海電視節白玉蘭獎最佳男主角獎。2019 年主演的電影《南方車站的聚會》入圍戛納國際電影節主競賽單元。2022 年主演電視劇《縣委大院》。2023 年憑藉電影《不虛此行》獲得第 25 屆上海國際電影節金爵獎最佳男演員獎；同年主演都市劇《繁花》播出。
data.name: 胡歌

data.biography: 苏晓彤，1998年11月9日出生于河南开封，中国内地影视女演员。2013年，苏晓彤因拍摄战争剧《四十九日·祭》而正式踏入演艺圈。2015年，出演年代剧《少帅》中的少年张首芳。2016年，凭借犯罪悬疑电影《黑处有什么》中的曲靖一角获得第19届上海国际电影节最佳女演员提名。2017年5月，获得第24届北京大学生电影节最佳新人奖。2019年，与张新成、周雨彤合作主演古装悬疑剧《大宋少年志》。
data.name: 苏晓彤

data.biography: Su Xiaotong, born on November 9, 1998 in Kaifeng, Henan, is a film and television actress in Mainland China. In 2013, Su Xiaotong officially entered the entertainment industry by filming the war drama "Forty-nine Days Festival". In 2015, she starred as the young Zhang Shoufang in the period drama "Young Marshal". In 2016, she was nominated for Best Actress at the 19th Shanghai International Film Festival for her role as Qu Jing in the crime suspense film "What's in the Dark". In May 2017, she won the Best Newcomer Award at the 24th Beijing University Student Film Festival. In 2019, she co-starred with Zhang Xincheng and Zhou Yutong in the costume suspense drama "Youth of the Song Dynasty".
data.name: Su Xiaotong

data.biography: 蘇曉彤
data.name: 蘇曉彤

data.biography: Su Xiaotong, nascida em 9 de novembro de 1998 em Kaifeng, Henan, é atriz de cinema e televisão na China Continental. Em 2013, Su Xiaotong entrou oficialmente na indústria do entretenimento ao filmar o drama de guerra "Festival dos Quarenta e Nove Dias ". Em 2015, ele estrelou como o jovem Zhang Shoufang no drama de época "Young Marshal". Em 2016, ela foi indicada para Melhor Atriz no 19.º Festival Internacional de Cinema de Xangai por seu papel como Qu Jing no filme de suspense policial "What's in the Dark". Em maio de 2017, ele ganhou o prêmio de Melhor Revelação no 24.º Festival de Cinema Estudantil da Universidade de Pequim. Em 2019, ele co-estrelou com Zhang Xincheng e Zhou Yutong no drama de suspense "Juventude da Dinastia Song".
蘇曉彤
data.name: 蘇曉彤

data.biography:
马丹旎（Ma Dan Ni）， 中国内地女演员，出生于北京市东城区，毕业于上海戏剧学院影视戏剧表演系本科。

在校期间专业课和文化课等都名列前茅，多年获得全能奖学金、专业奖学金、英语单项奖学金等，有优秀毕业生称号。以优异的成绩考入上戏 在校期间专业课和文化课等都名列前茅，多年获得全能奖学金、专业奖学金、英语单项奖学金等，有优秀毕业生称号。
data.name: 马丹旎

data.biography:
馬丹旎（Ma Dan Ni）， 中國內地女演員，出生於北京市東城區，畢業於上海戲劇學院影視戲劇表演系本科。

在校期間專業課和文化課等都名列前茅，多年獲得全能獎學金、專業獎學金、英語單項獎學金等，有優秀畢業生稱號。以優異的成績考入上戲 在校期間專業課和文化課等都名列前茅，多年獲得全能獎學金、專業獎學金、英語單項獎學金等，有優秀畢業生稱號。
data.name: 馬丹旎
Cơn Say Mùa Xuân
data.overview:
Nhân vật chính Yun Bom (Lee Joo Bin) là một giáo viên trung học tại Seoul. Sau những biến cố trong cuộc sống, cô quyết định rời thành phố để chuyển về dạy học tại một ngôi trường nhỏ ở vùng quê. Ban đầu, Yun Bom khép kín và giữ khoảng cách với mọi người xung quanh, cho đến khi cô gặp Seon Jae Gyu (Ahn Bo Hyun).

Seon Jae Gyu sở hữu vẻ ngoài thô ráp, ít nói, nhưng bên trong lại là một người ấm áp, chân thành và luôn quan tâm đến người khác. Qua những lần tiếp xúc giản dị, cả hai dần xoa dịu nỗi cô đơn của nhau, mở lòng và tìm thấy sự bình yên giữa khung cảnh thôn quê yên ả.

data.biography: Belén Cuesta Llamas (Sevilla, 24 de enero de 1984) es una actriz española. Ha sido nominada en tres ocasiones a los Premios Goya, obteniendo el galardón como mejor actriz protagonista por su papel en La trinchera infinita (2019). Es conocida por su participación en películas y series de gran popularidad como Ocho apellidos catalanes (2015), Paquita Salas (2016-2019), La llamada (2017) y La casa de papel (2019-2021).
Belén Cuesta was born on January 24, 1984 in Seville (Andalusia, Spain). She is an actress, known for The Endless Trench (2019), Klaus (2019), Paquita Salas (2016) and Holy Camp! (2017).
data.name: Belén Cuesta

data.biography: Belén Cuesta Llamas (Sevilha, 24 de janeiro de 1984) é uma atriz e modelo espanhola. Em 2020, ganhou o Prêmio Goya de melhor atriz pelo seu papel no filme La trinchera infinita. Ela estrelou a série de comédia Paquita Salas. Seu papel como Magüi Moreno, assistente do personagem-título da série mencionada, ganhou grande popularidade com algumas de suas falas se tornando virais. Ela apareceu em Money Heist como Manila (uma mulher transgênero e prima de Denver), inicialmente passando como refém no Banco da Espanha , mais tarde divulgada como membro do bando de ladrões.

JYP엔터테인먼트 소속 5인조 걸그룹 ITZY의 멤버.

2017년 Stray Kids와 믹스나인에 출연과 방탄소년단 LOVE YOURSELF Highlight Reel '起承轉結'에서 제이홉과 지민의 파트너 역으로 얼굴을 알렸고, 2019년 걸그룹 ITZY의 멤버로 데뷔했다.
data.name: 류진

data.biography: Shin Ryu-jin (신류진; born April 17, 2001), known professionally as Ryujin (류진) is a South Korean singer and actress under JYP Entertainment. She is a member of the South Korean girl group ITZY.
data.name: Ryujin

data.biography:
申留真（韩语：신류진；英语：Shin Ryu-jin），韩国女歌手、演员。

2017年参加JTBC选秀节目 MIXNINE，在节目中获得女子组第一名。同年在电影 The King 中客串出演“智敏”一角。

2019年2月12日，申留真作为 JYP Entertainment 旗下女子组合 ITZY 成员正式出道，在组合中担任中心位、主Rapper、领舞及副唱。

2025年出演电影《地上的夜》《剃刀》《高中生侦探》等作品。
data.name: 申留真

data.biography:
Omar Rafael Chaparro Alvídrez (Chihuahua, Chihuahua, Mexico; November 26, 1974), better known by his stage name Omar Chaparro, is a Mexican comedian, actor, comedian, singer, composer, producer, lecturer and radio and television host.

He is known for creating and performing his humorous characters in his radio and television programs where he is also a host, for acting in several Mexican and Mexican-American films and for his double starring role in Netflix's musical comedy film, in tribute to Pedro Infante, Como caído del cielo (Like Fallen from the Sky).

In addition to being mostly recognized in the Latin dubbing world as the Spanish voice of the panda "Po" in the movie Kung Fu Panda and its continuations.

He also established himself as a singer and has recorded two albums, among them, is his outstanding album entitled Me enamoré de ti, which included his three hits "Sigues tan hermosa", "Me enamoré de ti" and "Aferrado".
data.name: Omar Chaparro

data.biography: Omar Rafael Chaparro Alvidrez é um ator mexicano, comediante, apresentador de TV, personalidade de mídia e cantor.
奥马尔·拉斐尔·查帕罗·阿尔维德雷斯（墨西哥奇瓦瓦州奇瓦瓦州;1974 年 11 月 26 日），以他的艺名奥马尔·查帕罗 （Omar Chaparro） 而闻名，是墨西哥喜剧演员、演员、喜剧演员、歌手、作曲家、制片人、讲师和广播电视主持人。
data.name: 奥马尔·查帕罗

data.biography: 奧馬爾·拉斐爾·查帕羅·阿爾維德雷斯（墨西哥奇瓦瓦州奇瓦瓦州; 1974 年 11 月 26 日），以他的藝名奧馬爾·查帕羅 （Omar Chaparro） 而聞名，是墨西哥喜劇演員、演員、喜劇演員、歌手、作曲家、製片人、講師和廣播電視主持人。
data.name: 奧馬爾·查帕羅
